startPoint.en: Talk to Queen of Snow at the Snowball Arena in the Land of Snow's Christmas Village.
startPoint.es: Habla con Queen of Snow en la Snowball Arena del Christmas Village de Land of Snow.

rewards.display: Lamp of imperfection yielding 1,500 experience in a skill of choice
Lamp of people pleasing yielding 1,500 experience in a skill of choice
Lamp of procrastination yielding 1,500 experience in a skill of choice

rewards.name: Christmas event
rewards.display: Emotes from previous Christmas events (if not unlocked)

rewards.name: Christmas Village
rewards.display: Access to the snowman combat activity in the Christmas Village

steps.section: Talking to the Queen of Snow

text.en: Free backpack slot

steps.section: Talking to the Queen of Snow

text.en: Talk to the Queen of Snow at the snowball arena in Christmas Village.
text.es: Habla con Queen of Snow en la snowball arena del Christmas Village.

steps.section: Talking to the Queen of Snow

text.en: Talk to her again.
text.es: Habla con ella de nuevo.

steps.section: Talking to the Queen of Snow

text.en: Continue through the dialogue.
text.es: Continúa con el diálogo.

steps.section: Talking to the Queen of Snow

text.en: Inspect each of the three snowmen and go through all the options for all three.
text.es: Examina a cada uno de los tres muñecos de nieve y revisa todas las opciones en los tres.

steps.section: Talking to the Queen of Snow

text.en: Talk to the Queen of Snow again.
text.es: Habla con Queen of Snow de nuevo.

steps.section: Talking to the Queen of Snow

text.en: Inspect each of the three snowmen again.
text.es: Examina de nuevo a cada uno de los tres muñecos de nieve.

steps.section: Talking to the Queen of Snow

text.en: Talk to the Queen of Snow again and go through all the options.
text.es: Habla con Queen of Snow otra vez y revisa todas las opciones.

steps.section: Talking to the Queen of Snow

text.en: Leave Cold Front using the quest marker.
text.es: Sal de Cold Front usando el marcador de misión.

text.en: Chisel of conditional worth and 25 coal
Use the chisel of conditional worth on the coal and make five pieces of 'perfect' coal.
text.es: Usa el chisel of conditional worth en el carbón y crea cinco piezas de carbón 'perfecto'.

text.en: Take 20 carrots from the bucket o' carrots near the hungry reindeer on the south-western wall outside of Diango's Workshop.
text.es: Coge 20 zanahorias del bucket o' carrots junto al reno hambriento en la pared suroeste, fuera del Diango's Workshop.

text.en: Use the chisel of conditional worth on the carrots to make a 'perfect' carrot.
text.es: Usa el chisel of conditional worth en las zanahorias para crear una zanahoria 'perfecta'.

text.en: Gather 10 branches by chopping fir trees.
text.es: Reúne 10 ramas cortando abetos.

text.en: Use the chisel of conditional worth on the branches to make two 'perfect' branches.
text.es: Usa el chisel of conditional worth en las ramas para crear dos ramas 'perfectas'.

text.en: Return and talk to the Queen of Snow
text.es: Vuelve y habla con Queen of Snow

text.en: Talk to the Queen of Snow again in the centre of the snowball arena.
text.es: Habla con Queen of Snow de nuevo en el centro de la snowball arena.

text.en: Make a snowball with one of the piles of snow and push it to the marked spot at the top of the hill. The snowball needs to be pushed so that it becomes a large snowball precisely when reaching the reticule on the top of the hill, requiring a total of eight pushes.
text.es: Haz una bola de nieve con uno de los montones de nieve y empújala hasta el punto marcado en lo alto de la colina. La bola de nieve debe empujarse de forma que se convierta en una bola de nieve grande justo al llegar a la marca en lo alto de la colina, lo que requiere un total de ocho empujones.

text.en: You can't push diagonally, nor south from under the Queen of Snow.
text.es: No puedes empujar en diagonal, ni hacia el sur desde debajo de Queen of Snow.

text.en: At any point, you can break the snowball down, and the pile of snow will reappear in the spot where you broke it down.
text.es: En cualquier momento puedes deshacer la bola de nieve, y el montón de nieve reaparecerá en el lugar donde la deshiciste.

text.en: Repeat with another pile of snow to make an enormous snowball positioned next to the large snowball, requiring a total of 10 pushes.
text.es: Repite con otro montón de nieve para hacer una bola de nieve enorme colocada junto a la bola de nieve grande, lo que requiere un total de 10 empujones.

text.en: Repeat with the remaining pile of snow to make an average snowball positioned next to the previous snowballs, requiring a total of five pushes.
text.es: Repite con el montón de nieve restante para hacer una bola de nieve mediana colocada junto a las bolas de nieve anteriores, lo que requiere un total de cinco empujones.

text.en: Continue through the dialogue.
text.es: Continúa con el diálogo.

chatOptions: 1 You taught her to feel ashamed for having needs.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
